title: Minky Delicate Bra Wash Bag 2 Pack, Reusable Laundry Bags for Washing Machine, Mesh Laundry Protective Case with Zips
features: GENTLE CARE FOR DELICATES - Perfect for delicate garments like underwear, these wash bags provide gentle care while preventing snags, stretching, or tangling in the machine.
HIGH QUALITY - Cushioned mesh fabric adds an extra layer of protection, allowing garments to stay safe during washing while letting water and detergent flow freely.
PROTECT CLOTHES - A protective zipper cover prevents the zip from opening mid-cycle, keeping clothes securely inside the bag throughout the entire wash and spin.
PROLONGS GARMENT LIFE - These bags help extend the life of your favourite garments, keeping them looking newer for longer, while coming out clean and fresh every time.
COMPACT & PRACTICAL – Measures approximately 17.5cm (H) x 25cm (W), perfectly sized to protect bras and delicate underwear during washing.
description: Product Description Minky Delicate Bra Wash Bag Designed for delicate garments like underwear, our delicate wash bags deliver gentle care while protecting against snags, stretching, and tangles - keeping your clothes looking like new. Convenient Size Measuring approximately 17.5 cm (H) x 25 cm (W), it's the great size for safeguarding bras and delicate underwear in every wash. Gentle Care The secure zipper cover locks in place during the wash, preventing accidental openings and keeping your garments safely contained from start to finish.
